description: 移動バリエーションの追加セット: しゃがみ・よじ登り・ダッシュ・着地・壁ずり落ちの5状態(hires, toon-3, 6ジョブ)。platformer-hero系プリセットと組み合わせて使う想定。

states.name: crouch
states.action: Held crouching pose: lowered stance with a very small idle shift between the two frames.
requirements: Keep the crouched pose, facing direction, and silhouette essentially identical between the two frames aside from the subtle shift.
Do not show walking, running, or transitioning into the crouch; this is the held pose only.
Feet should stay planted and grounded.

states.name: climb
states.action: Climbing cycle on a ladder or vertical wall/ledge: alternating hand-over-hand and leg reach through the 4 frames.
requirements: The pose must read clearly as climbing (facing the climbing surface, reaching/pulling arms), not walking or running.
The stride/reach must visibly alternate across the 4 frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw the ladder or wall surface itself, floor shadows, or motion trails.

states.name: dash
states.action: Quick forward dash burst: low forward-leaning anticipation, a driving forward-leaning stride, and a brief recovery lean back toward neutral.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face and travel right, distinct from the ordinary run cycle through a more extreme forward lean.
Do not draw speed lines, motion blur, afterimages, dust clouds, or any detached motion effect.
Keep the character fully on-model with no cropped limbs during the forward lean.

states.name: land
states.action: Landing recovery after a fall: impact absorption crouch, brief hold, and stand back up to neutral.
requirements: Show the landing through pose and vertical body compression only.
Do not draw ground shadows, dust clouds, impact bursts, or landing marks.
The final frame should read as a stable neutral standing pose.

states.name: wall-slide
states.action: Held wall-slide pose: braced sideways against a wall while sliding down, with a very small idle shift between the two frames.
requirements: Keep the braced sideways pose, facing direction, and silhouette essentially identical between the two frames aside from the subtle shift.
Do not draw the wall surface itself, friction sparks, dust, or motion streaks.
The pose must read clearly as bracing against a vertical surface, not standing or crouching on the ground.
